entry.title: 🎉 **Placement Success at Lamrin Tech Skills University!** 🎓💼

media:group.media:title: 🎉 **Placement Success at Lamrin Tech Skills University!** 🎓💼
media:group.media:description:
🎉 **Placement Success at Lamrin Tech Skills University!** 🎓💼
Congratulations to Gaurav, Shourya & Neha from MBA – Finance & Capital Market (Batch 2024–2026)on being selected as Relationship Managers at ICICI Bank! 🏦👏
📍 Gaurav & Shourya – Nawanshahr Branch 📍 Neha – Ropar Branch
Your hard work and dedication have turned into success. Wishing you a bright and prosperous career ahead! 🚀
👉 Admissions Open 2026 | Industry-Integrated Programs | Strong Placement Support
#LTSU #LamrinTechSkillsUniversity #ICICIBank #PlacementSuccess #CampusPlacement #MBA #MBAFinance #Finance #CareerSuccess #StudentSuccess #UniversityLife #Punjab #HigherEducation #Jobs #PlacementDrive #FutureLeaders #Education #Skills #IndustryReady #Shorts #YTShorts

media:group.media:title: 🎓 HOTEL MANAGEMENT ADMISSIONS OPEN 2026 🎓
media:group.media:description:
🎓 HOTEL MANAGEMENT ADMISSIONS OPEN 2026 🎓
Turn your passion for hospitality into a global career with Lamrin Tech Skills University (LTSU), Punjab.
✅ Industry-Integrated Hotel Management Program ✅ Internship Opportunities with Leading Hotel Brands ✅ Practical Training & Live Industry Exposure ✅ Placement-Focused Curriculum ✅ International Internship Opportunities in France, Spain, Mauritius & Germany* ✅ Learn from Industry Experts
🌍 Build a successful career in Hotels, Resorts, Cruise Lines, Tourism & Hospitality Management.
📞 Admission Helpline: +91 84800 05390
📍 Lamrin Tech Skills University, Punjab
*International internships available on extra payment basis.
#LTSU #LamrinTechSkillsUniversity #HotelManagement #HospitalityManagement #AdmissionsOpen #HotelManagementCourse #Internship #InternationalInternship #FranceInternship #SpainInternship #MauritiusInternship #GermanyInternship #HospitalityCareer #StudyInPunjab #CareerInHospitality

entry.title: ₹2.5 Crore Package Se Nahi, Skills Se Milegi Job! | LTSU Punjab

media:group.media:title: ₹2.5 Crore Package Se Nahi, Skills Se Milegi Job! | LTSU Punjab
media:group.media:description:
Big packages dekhkar college choose mat karo!
Aaj employers ko chahiye skilled professionals with projects, internships, and real industry exposure.
Join Lamrin Tech Skills University, Punjab's First Skill University.
✅ IBM, Microsoft, L&T Edutech & IIT Mandi Industry-Integrated Programs ✅ Project-Based Learning ✅ 1 Year Internship ✅ Placement-Focused Education
📞 Call/WhatsApp: 8480005390
#LTSU #LamrinTechSkillsUniversity #SkillUniversity #Engineering #IBM #Microsoft #Internship #Placement #Career #Admissions2026

media:group.media:title: 🎉 Congratulations to all CUET aspirants!
media:group.media:description:
🎉 Congratulations to all CUET aspirants!
Your CUET score can now help you access quality higher education with scholarships at Lamrin Tech Skills University (LTSU), Punjab's First Skill University.
LTSU offers: ✔ Industry-Integrated Programs ✔ 1 Year On-the-Job Training ✔ Strong Industry Collaborations ✔ Project-Based Learning ✔ Future-Focused Curriculum ✔ Scholarships Based on CUET Performance
Build the skills employers are looking for and prepare for the careers of tomorrow.
📢 Admissions Open 2026
📞 Admission Helpline: +91 84800 05390 🌐 Apply Now: https://apply.ltsu.ac.in
#CUET2026 #CUETResult #LTSU #LamrinTechSkillsUniversity #Scholarships #AdmissionsOpen2026 #IndustryIntegratedLearning #CareerReady #FutureSkills #HigherEducation #StudentSuccess #SkillBasedEducation

entry.title: 🚀 AI is not just the future — it's already changing the world!

media:group.media:title: 🚀 AI is not just the future — it's already changing the world!
media:group.media:description:
🚀 AI is not just the future — it's already changing the world!
From healthcare and finance to education and entertainment, Artificial Intelligence is transforming every industry. The question is not whether AI will impact your career, but whether you'll be ready for it.
🎓 If you've completed your 12th and want to build a future-proof career, join Lamrin Tech Skills University, Punjab's First Skill University.
💡 Explore industry-integrated AI programs designed to make you job-ready with: ✅ AI & Machine Learning ✅ Data Science ✅ Cyber Security ✅ Industry Projects ✅ Hands-on Learning ✅ 1 Year On-the-Job Training ✅ Strong Industry Partnerships
Don't just use AI. Learn to build with AI.
Admissions Open 2026
📞 Admission Helpline: +91 84800 05390
Apply Now - https://apply.ltsu.ac.in
#LamrinTechSkillsUniversity #LTSU #ArtificialIntelligence #AI #MachineLearning #FutureReady #AIEducation #DataScience #TechCareers #CareerAfter12th #SkillUniversity #PunjabFirstSkillUniversity #AdmissionsOpen #FutureOfWork #IndustryIntegratedLearning

entry.title: ਲੈਮਰਿਨ ਟੈਕ ਸਕਿੱਲਜ਼ ਯੂਨੀਵਰਸਿਟੀ (LTSU) ਵਿੱਚ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਸਵਾਗਤ ਹੈ – ਪੰਜਾਬ ਦੀ ਪਹਿਲੀ ਸਕਿੱਲ ਯੂਨੀਵਰਸਿਟੀ ਅਤੇ ਭਾਰਤ

media:group.media:title: ਲੈਮਰਿਨ ਟੈਕ ਸਕਿੱਲਜ਼ ਯੂਨੀਵਰਸਿਟੀ (LTSU) ਵਿੱਚ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਸਵਾਗਤ ਹੈ – ਪੰਜਾਬ ਦੀ ਪਹਿਲੀ ਸਕਿੱਲ ਯੂਨੀਵਰਸਿਟੀ ਅਤੇ ਭਾਰਤ
media:group.media:description:
🎓 ਲੈਮਰਿਨ ਟੈਕ ਸਕਿੱਲਜ਼ ਯੂਨੀਵਰਸਿਟੀ (LTSU) ਵਿੱਚ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਸਵਾਗਤ ਹੈ – ਪੰਜਾਬ ਦੀ ਪਹਿਲੀ ਸਕਿੱਲ ਯੂਨੀਵਰਸਿਟੀ ਅਤੇ ਭਾਰਤ ਦੀ ਪਹਿਲੀ ਇੰਡਸਟਰੀ-ਇਨਕਿਊਬੇਟਡ ਯੂਨੀਵਰਸਿਟੀ।
ਇੱਥੇ ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਸਿਰਫ਼ ਕਲਾਸਰੂਮ ਤੱਕ ਸੀਮਿਤ ਨਹੀਂ। ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀਆਂ ਨੂੰ ਮਿਲਦਾ ਹੈ ਅਸਲ ਇੰਡਸਟਰੀ ਐਕਸਪੋਜ਼ਰ, ਪ੍ਰੋਜੈਕਟ-ਬੇਸਡ ਲਰਨਿੰਗ, ਐਡਵਾਂਸਡ ਲੈਬਜ਼, ਐਕਸਪਰਟ ਮੈਨਟਰਸ਼ਿਪ ਅਤੇ 1 ਸਾਲ ਦੀ ਆਨ-ਦ-ਜੌਬ ਟ੍ਰੇਨਿੰਗ।
✅ 50+ ਕਰੀਅਰ-ਫੋਕਸਡ ਪ੍ਰੋਗਰਾਮ ✅ 24 ਰਾਜਾਂ ਤੋਂ ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀ ✅ ਇੰਡਸਟਰੀ-ਇੰਟੀਗ੍ਰੇਟਡ ਕਰਿਕੁਲਮ ✅ ਪ੍ਰੋਜੈਕਟ-ਬੇਸਡ ਲਰਨਿੰਗ ✅ ਐਡਵਾਂਸਡ ਇਨਫ੍ਰਾਸਟਰੱਕਚਰ ✅ ਐਕਸਪਰਟ ਫੈਕਲਟੀ ਅਤੇ ਮੈਨਟਰਜ਼ ✅ 1 ਸਾਲ ਦੀ ਆਨ-ਦ-ਜੌਬ ਟ੍ਰੇਨਿੰਗ ✅ ਮੈਰਿਟ ਅਧਾਰਿਤ ਸਕਾਲਰਸ਼ਿਪਸ
ਇੰਜੀਨੀਅਰਿੰਗ, ਕੰਪਿਊਟਿੰਗ, ਮੈਨੇਜਮੈਂਟ, ਕਾਮਰਸ, ਫਾਰਮੇਸੀ, ਹੈਲਥਕੇਅਰ, ਡਿਜ਼ਾਇਨ, ਹੋਟਲ ਮੈਨੇਜਮੈਂਟ ਅਤੇ ਹੋਰ ਕਈ ਪ੍ਰੋਗਰਾਮਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਦਾਖਲੇ ਖੁੱਲ੍ਹੇ ਹਨ।
🚀 ਡਿਗਰੀ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ ਸਕਿੱਲਜ਼, ਤਜਰਬਾ ਅਤੇ ਸਫਲ ਕਰੀਅਰ ਹਾਸਲ ਕਰੋ।
📢 Admissions Open Now
#LamrinTechSkillsUniversity #LTSU #AdmissionsOpen #Punjab #SkillUniversity #IndustryIntegratedEducation #CareerReady #HigherEducation #Engineering #BCA #BBA #MBA #MCA
Apply Today!

entry.title: Lamrin Tech Skills University Punjab is live

media:group.media:title: Lamrin Tech Skills University Punjab is live

entry.title: First Skill University of Punjab | 🎓 Admissions Open 2026 | Lamrin Tech Skills University (LTSU)

media:group.media:title: First Skill University of Punjab | 🎓 Admissions Open 2026 | Lamrin Tech Skills University (LTSU)
media:group.media:description:
🎓 Admissions Open 2026 | Lamrin Tech Skills University (LTSU)
🚀 Build Your Career with Industry-Integrated Education
Join India's First Industry-Incubated University and gain the skills, experience, and industry exposure needed to succeed in today's competitive job market.
✨ Why Choose LTSU?
✅ Industry-Integrated Programs ✅ 1 Year Internship / On-the-Job Training ✅ Project-Based Learning ✅ High-Quality Placement Opportunities ✅ Scholarships Based on Academic Performance ✅ Learn from Industry Experts ✅ Modern Labs & Smart Campus ✅ Multiple Career-Focused Specializations
💰 Pay Half Fees After Placement* Study now and pay 50% of your tuition fee after securing a job through the university placement process.
📚 Programs Available: Engineering | Computer Applications | Management | Commerce | Pharmacy | Healthcare | Design | Hotel Management | Media & More
🏆 Award-Winning University Recognized for Excellence in Industry-Academia Integration
📍 Campus: Ropar, Punjab
Admissions are filling fast. Apply now and take the first step towards a successful career.
📞 Contact Us 84800 05390

entry.title: Yuva Kaushal Utsav 2026 | Celebrating Youth Talent at LTSU 2026

media:group.media:title: Yuva Kaushal Utsav 2026 | Celebrating Youth Talent at LTSU 2026
media:group.media:description:
🎉 Yuva Kaushal Utsav 2026 is a celebration of talent, creativity, innovation, and youth power! From exciting performances and competitions to unforgettable campus moments, this event brings together passionate young minds to showcase their skills and celebrate their achievements. The energy, enthusiasm, and grand live concert make it a truly memorable experience for every student. 🚀✨
#YuvaKaushalUtsav2026 #YouthCelebration #LTSUPunjab #StudentLife #CampusFest

entry.title: 🎉 LTSU Students Selected for IIT Jammu Research Internship!

media:group.media:title: 🎉 LTSU Students Selected for IIT Jammu Research Internship!
media:group.media:description:
🎉 LTSU Students Selected for IIT Jammu Research Internship!
🏆 Sameer Kumar (Data Science) 🏆 Hemant Baghel (Cybersecurity)
Both B.Tech CSE (IBM Integrated) students have secured prestigious Summer Research Internships at IIT Jammu.
🔬 AI & Medical Image Analysis 🔐 AI Security & Adversarial Robustness ⭐ DRDO Intern
Congratulations to our achievers and the entire LTSU family!
#LTSU #IITJammu #IBMICE #ResearchInternship #BTechCSE #AI #CyberSecurity #Shorts #StudentSuccess #Engineering
